titleVerdict.actual: Director of Client Success & Community / Head of Programs

topCompanies.name: Shopify
topCompanies.whyTheyPay: Their merchant success and community teams value exactly this blend of technical fluency, program design, and partnership management, and they pay Toronto-market premiums.

topCompanies.name: HubSpot
topCompanies.whyTheyPay: Their customer onboarding and implementation teams need people who can build scalable processes across enterprise accounts, and they compensate well for implementation + community hybrids.

topCompanies.name: LinkedIn
topCompanies.whyTheyPay: Their Learning & Career verticals hire for the exact intersection of coaching methodology, AI tooling, and content strategy, with US-level compensation even for Canadian remote roles.

methodology: Based on 14+ years of progressive experience spanning SaaS implementation (Dutchie), community scaling (Lighthouse Labs), and program design (ClearCareer), benchmarked against Director-level Client Success and Community roles in the Toronto tech market with AI tooling expertise as an accelerator.
